_comment_: SH_DISTAL (Pyrcz 2004) — sand-rich distal sheet architecture; high NTG, wide stacked channel sheets with thick prominent levees, very rare avulsion. See header of config_full_pv_shoestring.json for the comment-tag convention used here ('skip — preset default' / 'skip — class default' / 'VARIED').

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. SH-distal channels are 70-110m wide -> 7-11 cells. Migration step ~35m -> 3.5 cells/event. Note SH_DISTAL preset uses nlevel=6 (not 8) — see kwarg below.

preset._comment_: Pyrcz 2004 sand-rich distal sheet architecture. Locks rest of kwargs to SH_DISTAL baseline unless overridden below.

mCHsinu._comment_: VARIED. Mean sinuosity. Baseline 1.3 (low — distal sheets are typically straighter).

mCHwdratio._comment_: VARIED. SH-distal W:D. Wide channels are characteristic of distal sheets.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

probAvulInside._comment_: VARIED. Low in-belt avulsion (sheets stay laterally continuous). Baseline 0.05.

mFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Abandoned-channel mud-plug fraction. Widened to [0.0, 0.2] for visual variability.

mdistMigrate._comment_: VARIED. Migration distance per event (m). Baseline 35.

azimuth._comment_: VARIED. Flow direction (deg, clockwise from +x). Channels are not 180-symmetric so the full circle matters.

nlevel._comment_: AUTO. nlevel = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper channels stack fewer levels; shallower stack more — basin always full.

ntime._comment_: per-level event budget (50 events × nlevel total). Sized so each level fills with the preset's typical channel density.

ntime_per_level._comment_: TRUE so every level gets its own event budget (independent of how many lower levels consumed). Without this, deep levels starve when NTGtarget=0.99 stops never firing.

probAvulOutside._comment_: skip — preset default. SH_DISTAL overrides class 0.10 -> 0.02 (very rare out-of-belt jumps; sheets stay coherent).

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.15 -> 0.1.

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 2.0.

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. SH_DISTAL has prominent levees: override of class 1.0 -> 1.2.

mLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default. Distinctive feature: very wide levees; override of class 40 -> 150.

stdevLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 5 -> 25.

mLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.5 -> 1.0 (tall levees).

stdevLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.1 -> 0.2.

mLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.3 -> 0.2.

mCSnum._comment_: splays disabled — adds visual complexity without diagnostic value; future versions can re-enable.

mNeckFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Neck-cutoff plug not used here.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0078 -> 0.0036.

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 2.0 -> 10.0.
